chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-999 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 07-09-2023 Mr. Muhammad Ali Dayo, Advocate along with petitioner. Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant A.G. ***** Najaf Ali, Clerk on behalf of CMO, M.C, Khairpur is present and submits original cheque of Rs.200,000/- dated 11.09.2023, which is handed over to petitioner. He submits that coming month, Rs. 400,000/- would be given to petitioner and thereafter in installments, Rs. 3,00,000/- per month, would be given to him till clearing of outstanding amount. Petitioner and his counsel are satisfied. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
